chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1392 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For hearing of CMA No.8131/2024 (S/A) 2. For hearing of main case 27-10-2025 M/s Ali Gul Abbasi and Muhammad Zohaib Azam Rajput, Advocates for the Petitioners Mr. Muhammad Tariq Panhwar, Advocate for Respondents 3 and 5 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh O R D E R Through this Petition, the Petitioner has prayed that the Respondents be directed to restore the status of the Vegetable Market as well as the Bus Stand situated at Taluka Ubauro, District Ghotki. After issuance of notice, comments were filed on behalf of the Respondents. It transpired therefrom that, in respect of the Bus Stand, another petition had already been filed and decided by this Court. Accordingly, learned counsel for the Petitioner, at the very outset, did not press the prayer clause relating to the Bus Stand and confined the Petition only to the extent of the Vegetable Market. In the comments, the Deputy Commissioner, Ghotki has also admitted that encroachments exist upon the land of the Vegetable Market. Under these circumstances, we have no option but to direct the Deputy Commissioner, Ghotki to remove all encroachments from the Vegetable Market and to restore it to its original status and location. The Deputy Commissioner shall also take necessary measures to facilitate the general public for the intended purpose for which the Vegetable Market was established within sixty days. The Petition, along with the listed application stands disposed of in the above terms. Compliance report shall be submitted to this Court through the Additional Registrar.
The Petition, along with the listed application stands disposed of in the above terms. Compliance report shall be submitted to this Court through the Additional Registrar. Judge Judge ARBROHI
